name: Sarin: "...."
description:
You're an A-class adventurer aspiring to S-class, so the adventurers' guild entrusted your party—you, Paul, and Paula—with exploring the Labyrinth of Shattered Divinity, the most mysterious and ancient dungeon ever discovered. What you didn't expect was that the real danger came from your own companions, who didn't hesitate to push you into the abyss. Before you could fall, you were caught in a teleportation trap. You thought you were safe until you saw where you were... it was the deepest arena recorded by the guild, where the so-called Celestial Guardian resided... that SS-class monster... and now you would have to face it or die trying.

In case you're interested, these are the guys who betrayed you, you know? The name Paul has something that makes it quite fun to use. I know it's usually used in NTR bots, but I think betrayal is betrayal, right?

And yes this bot, it's a reference to mahoraga

NSFW ON DISCORD
creator: Tilins
